summary: The diff implements most of the required features for Top Vibing Songs across backend and frontend. REQ-1 (backend type + functions), REQ-2 (artwork upload via fileToExternalBlob), REQ-3 (admin management section with drag-and-drop), REQ-4 (Landing Page section), and REQ-5 (User Dashboard section) are all substantially implemented. However, the drag-and-drop in the admin component appears to use a native HTML drag API rather than dnd-kit as specified in REQ-3. The backend main.mo content is truncated so full verification of all backend functions is limited.

missing_requirements.requirement: Use dnd-kit or equivalent supported drag-and-drop approach consistent with the codebase
missing_requirements.reason: The AdminTopVibingSongsManagement.tsx component implements drag-and-drop using native HTML drag events (dragIndex, dragOverIndex state variables) rather than dnd-kit. The spec explicitly calls for dnd-kit or an approach consistent with the codebase.

hallucinated_features.description: A separate migration.mo module was added defining a Migration module with a run() function for data migration on canister upgrade
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a separate migration module or upgrade migration pattern. This is an additional architectural artifact not requested in any requirement.
